title: Dangote Cement, FBNHoldings, others Lift Equity Market by N53bn - FinancialEDGE
description: The equity market rebounded on Thursday from its previous session’s loss, gaining N53 billion. Investor interest in key stocks such as Dangote Cement, FBN Holdings, Guaranty Trust Holding Company, GTCO, and Fidelity Bank, alongside other advancing equities, contributed to the market’s positive performance. The market capitalisation increased by N53 billion, or 0.09 per cent rising
html: The equity market rebounded on Thursday from its previous session’s loss, gaining N53 billion.
